target.title: Keep core doctor health in contribution order
target.body:
## Summary

- keep core doctor health checks anchored to the ordered doctor contribution list instead of registering them into the shared health registry for normal doctor paths
- make `doctor --lint` run core contribution checks first, then append bundled/plugin health registry checks as the extension surface
- keep `doctor --fix` positional by running browser legacy profile residue repair from the browser contribution slot and leaving the broad structured repair bridge for extension checks
- document the ownership split: core doctor contributions own core order, the shared health registry owns extension checks

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/cli/doctor.md src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor-lint.ts src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-lint.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-browser-residue-check.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-conversion-plan.test.ts src/flows/doctor-lint-flow.test.ts src/flows/doctor-repair-flow.test.ts --reporter=dot` (7 files, 52 tests)
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `bash /mnt/c/src/claws-hapi/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean after fixing the accepted browser-residue finding

## Notes

Follow-up to the shell completion registration work in #85566. This keeps that check in the core doctor contribution model instead of treating the shared health registry as the core doctor ordering source.
target.author: giodl73-repo
